variants.title: FilterFinder FF203799B Pressure Filter | Replaces the Filtrec D732G06BV
variants.option1Value: FilterFinder FF203799B Pressure Filter | Replaces the Filtrec D732G06BV
variants.description: The FF203799B is our FilterFinder Approved replacement to the Filtrec D732G06BV. Our element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of the original Filtrec filter, ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with our glass fiber media and a durable design, the FF203799B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. With FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Pressure Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 5µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 7µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 97 mm, Inner Diameter: 63.2 mm, Length: 382 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 210 bar, Seal Material: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 5µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 210 BAR, Seal: Viton
